mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_ACCOUNTS.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO accounts ( account_id, name, login_id, password, email, phone, region, role_type, status ) VALUES ( #{accountId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{region, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{roleType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT account_id AS accountId, name AS name, login_id AS loginId, password AS password, email AS email, phone AS phone, region AS region, role_type AS roleType, status AS status FROM accounts WHERE login_id = #{loginId}
